name: agentkv
description: Open-source clients for AgentKV — an agent-native, x402-paid, zero-knowledge encrypted key-value store. The wallet address is the namespace; no accounts or API keys.
author: The AgentKV Authors <contact@agentx402.ai>

scripts.build: npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace cli run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace client run typecheck && npm --workspace cli run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --workspace client test && npm --workspace cli test
scripts.test:coverage: npm --workspace client run test:coverage && npm --workspace cli run test:coverage
